text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi https://youtu.be/JAJjfLxM09k . The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-2476, it was released on 23 January 2021. https://vgmdb.net/album/108557 It is a song from the Evangelion x collaboration game. The song is a full recreation, complete with the original vocalist, of Cruel Angel's Thesis, but with every single lyric/syllable replaced with 'nyan', the Japanese onomatopoeia for a cat.

Tracklist

Lyrics

 

 

Staff

Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi

Trivia

The song was adapted into a opening length and animated in the Nyanko Studios.
